title: Phyllagathis longiradiosa
taxonomy: Phyllagathis longiradiosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Phyllagathis, which is a group of flowering plants native to Southeast Asia. The species Phyllagathis longiradiosa is further classified as a member of the order Gentianales and the class Magnoliopsida. Within the family Rubiaceae, it is part of the tribe Pentasmeleae. The classification of Phyllagathis longiradiosa reflects its evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other plants in the same family.
uses: Phyllagathis longiradiosa has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in relation to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities.
